retry_reason: aa_put_label is a release operation that cannot fail; retrying would be nonsensical.
contract_summary: This function is invoked during socket destruction to release all label references stored in the AppArmor socket context (label, peer, peer_lastupdate). It unconditionally decrements the refcount of each label via aa_put_label. After this call, those pointers are no longer valid and must not be accessed. The function assumes exclusive ownership of the socket context at deallocation time; no locking is required as the socket is being freed.

judge.reason: The entire function is dedicated to releasing three label references via aa_put_label; no other business logic is present.
